mapper.insert:
insert into store_goods_warehouse_adjust
adjust_no, dept_id, source_warehouse_id, target_warehouse_id, creator_id, adjust_time, status, comment, create_time, last_modify_time,
#{adjustNo}, #{deptId}, #{sourceWarehouseId}, #{targetWarehouseId}, #{creatorId}, #{adjustTime}, #{status}, #{comment}, #{createTime}, #{lastModifyTime},
mapper.update: update store_goods_warehouse_adjust set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where adjust_id = #{adjustId}

update store_goods_warehouse_adjust set status=0,last_modify_time = now() where adjust_id in
#{adjustId}
mapper.select:
SELECT t1.adjust_no code, t1.dept_id, t5.dept_name deptName, t1.create_time createTime, t1.adjust_time adjusttime, t2.spu_no spuNo, t4.NAME spuName, t2.amount, t2.unit_number unitnumber, t2.adjust_number adjustnumber, t1.source_warehouse_id sourcewarehouseid, t1.target_warehouse_id targetwarehouseid, CASE t1.stock_status WHEN '0' THEN '未生成' WHEN '1' THEN '已生成' END AS stockstatus FROM store_goods_warehouse_adjust t1 JOIN store_goods_warehouse_adjust_item t2 ON t1.adjust_id = t2.adjust_id AND t1.STATUS != '0' AND t2.STATUS != '0' JOIN store_goods_spu t4 ON t2.spu_no = t4.spu_no JOIN sys_dept t5 ON t5.dept_id = t1.dept_id
and t1.adjust_no like concat('%', #{adjustNo}, '%') and t1.dept_id = #{deptId} and t1.stock_status = #{stockStatus} and t1.source_warehouse_id = #{sourceWarehouseId} and t1.target_warehouse_id = #{targetWarehouseId}
and t1.create_time BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(#{beginDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND DATE_FORMAT(#{endDate},'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
LIMIT 2000
